content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished domain param feature in src/jinja2/ext.py. Summary of changes: (1) GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS tuple extended with dgettext/dngettext; (2) added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext helper factories after _make_new_npgettext (around line 247); (3) _install() now also looks up translations.dgettext/dngettext; (4) _install_callables() gained dgettext/dngettext params with sane fallbacks (falls back to plain gettext/ngettext, ignoring domain, when translations object doesn't provide dgettext/dngettext) - both newstyle and oldstyle branches handled; (5) _uninstall() pops the two new global keys too; (6) parse(): added a 'domain' local var and a new branch in the param-parsing while-loop (checks token.value == 'domain', requires assign + string-literal Const, raises TemplateAssertionError on duplicate or non-literal domain) - note domain follows the same no-comma-required convention as 'trimmed', so  works but a comma between them does not (pre-existing parser quirk, same as trimmed); domain is passed through to _make_node as a new last positional arg; (7) _make_node() takes optional domain: Optional[str]=None param, and picks dgettext/dngettext (with domain as first Const arg) instead of gettext/ngettext when domain is set. All 830 existing tests pass. It's your turn now - feel free to edit src/jinja2/ext.py for your note/created/modified metadata feature on top of this.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished domain param feature in src/jinja2/ext.py. Summary: (1) GETTEXT_FUNCTIONS tuple extended with dgettext/dngettext. (2) Added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext factory functions right after _make_new_npgettext. (3) _install() now also looks up translations.dgettext/dngettext attrs. (4) _install_callables() gained dgettext/dngettext params with fallbacks to plain gettext/ngettext (ignoring domain) when the translations object lacks them - both newstyle and oldstyle branches handled. (5) _uninstall() pops the two new global keys too. (6) parse(): added a domain local var and a new branch in the param-parsing while-loop - checks token.value == domain, requires assign token + string-literal Const, raises TemplateAssertionError on duplicate or non-literal domain. Domain follows the same no-comma convention as trimmed (space-separated params, no comma between domain and the next param - this is a pre-existing parser quirk). domain is passed to _make_node as a new trailing positional arg. (7) _make_node() takes an optional domain param and picks dgettext/dngettext (domain passed as the first Const arg) instead of gettext/ngettext when set. All 830 existing tests still pass. Your turn - please layer your note/created/modified metadata feature on top of this version of the file.

Domain follows the same no-comma convention as trimmed (space-separated params, no comma between domain and the next param - this is a pre-existing parser quirk). domain is passed to _make_node as a new trailing positional arg. (7) _make_node() takes an optional domain param and picks dgettext/dngettext (domain passed as the first Const arg) instead of gettext/ngettext when set. All 830 existing tests still pass. Your turn - please layer your note/created/modified metadata feature on top of this version of the file.
